message:
chore: ignore macOS resource forks (._*) and compiled binaries (a.out)

Add two ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore:

- ._* — macOS AppleDouble resource fork files created when copying files
  to non-HFS+ volumes or by certain Finder operations. Three of these
  (._franken_favicon.png, ._frankentui_alien_artifact.png) were showing
  as untracked.
- a.out — default compiler output binary, likely from an ad-hoc C/Rust
  compilation test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
